text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 306 

SEGMENT_ID 

LABEL: Market Segment Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the identifier for the geographic market segment covered by the plan. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Three-digit number 

COMMENT: You need to know both the contract number and plan benefit package identification number 
(variables called CONTRACT_ID and PLAN_ID)
